steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The question asks where Discoglossus nigriventer was identified. The notes state it was identified in Israel in 2011 — the location is the critical detail to include.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly includes both the organism and the location: in Israel. The other three all fail: A focuses on the wrong species, C omits the location while describing a general concept, and D includes the year but not the required location. That matches choice B — B is correct.
